query:
SELECT 
  ms.id AS sessao_id,
  ms.sessionDate,
  ms.sessionNumber,
  ms.presence,
  ms.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome,
  ms.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  p.name AS empresa_nome,
  (SELECT ma.id FROM mentor_appointments ma
   JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
   WHERE ma.consultorId = ms.consultorId
   AND ma.scheduledDate = ms.sessionDate
   AND ap.alunoId = ms.alunoId
   AND ma.status != 'cancelado'
   LIMIT 1) AS agendamento_id,
  (SELECT ma.status FROM mentor_appointments ma
   JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
   WHERE ma.consultorId = ms.consultorId
   AND ma.scheduledDate = ms.sessionDate
   AND ap.alunoId = ms.alunoId
   LIMIT 1) AS agendamento_status
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ms.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id
WHERE ms.sessionDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ms.sessionDate <= '2026-03-31'
ORDER BY ms.consultorId, ms.sessionDate, a.name
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute 
SELECT 
  ms.id AS sessao_id,
  ms.sessionDate,
  ms.sessionNumber,
  ms.presence,
  ms.alunoId,
  a.name AS aluno_nome,
  ms.consultorId,
  c.name AS mentor_nome,
  p.name AS empresa_nome,
  (SELECT ma.id FROM mentor_appointments ma
   JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
   WHERE ma.consultorId = ms.consultorId
   AND ma.scheduledDate = ms.sessionDate
   AND ap.alunoId = ms.alunoId
   AND ma.status != 'cancelado'
   LIMIT 1) AS agendamento_id,
  (SELECT ma.status FROM mentor_appointments ma
   JOIN appointment_participants ap ON ap.appointmentId = ma.id
   WHERE ma.consultorId = ms.consultorId
   AND ma.scheduledDate = ms.sessionDate
   AND ap.alunoId = ms.alunoId
   LIMIT 1) AS agendamento_status
FROM mentoring_sessions ms
LEFT JOIN alunos a ON ms.alunoId = a.id
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON ms.consultorId = c.id
LEFT JOIN programs p ON a.programId = p.id
WHERE ms.sessionDate >= '2026-03-01' AND ms.sessionDate <= '2026-03-31'
ORDER BY ms.consultorId, ms.sessionDate, a.name
LIMIT 20;
